title: skillvet baseline
description: A fingerprint of a package you reviewed and trusted, so a later update can be diffed against it to detect a rug-pull (new dangerous capabilities appearing on 'update').

capabilities.description: Capability set observed at record time.

files.description: Per-file SHA-256, keyed by forward-slash relative path.

self_hash.description: BLAKE2b (16-byte) over the canonical body — a tamper check on the baseline file itself.
